conventions: Read `MPGA/INDEX.md` before substantive work; cite `[E] path:lines` when stating how code behaves.
The MPGA CLI package lives in `mpga-plugin/cli` (ESM TypeScript, `.js` import specifiers); build with `npm run build` there so `dist/` matches source.
Generated knowledge output is under repo-root `MPGA/`; `project.ignore` includes `MPGA/` so scans do not recurse into the layer.
Prefer extending existing Commander commands and generators (`sync`, `export`, `evidence`, `drift`) over parallel scripts.
Vitest tests live under `mpga-plugin/cli/src/**`; run `npm run check` in `mpga-plugin/cli` before shipping CLI changes.

keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/commands/export.ts: Multi-target export (Claude, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, Antigravity): agents, skills, rules, AGENTS.md.
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/commands/board.ts: Board CLI: columns, tasks, `board show`, moves, Markdown board view.
Builds per-scope markdown from scan + graph (symbols, files, evidence table).
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/commands/scope.ts: Scope subcommands: list, show, split suggestions, evidence stats.
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/commands/milestone.t: Milestone lifecycle under `MPGA/milestones` and board linkage.
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/commands/session.ts: Session handoff and context export under `MPGA/sessions`.
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/core/config.ts: Loads `mpga.config.json`, defaults, deep merge, project root discovery.
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/commands/init.ts: Bootstraps `MPGA/` tree, templates for INDEX and GRAPH.
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/board/board.ts: Board JSON state: load/save, columns, stats, task IDs.
Dependency graph from relative imports; orphans, circular deps, Mermaid.
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/commands/sync.ts: Full or incremental sync: scan, GRAPH, scopes, INDEX.
Renders `INDEX.md` identity, key files, scope registry (uses `knowledgeLayer` when set).
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/commands/evidence.ts: Evidence verify, heal, coverage, manual link registration.
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/evidence/drift.ts: Drift detection between evidence links and codebase symbols.
keyFileRoles.mpga-plugin/cli/src/cli.ts: Commander app setup: registers all `register*` command modules.
